arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Atletico de Madrid, 2025 Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Camavinga, Brahim, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe. Ancelotti will likely choose Tchouameni and Camavinga for his midfield, with Brahim and Rodrygo potentially playing on the flanks and helping the two midfielders whenever Atletico control the ball.

arts.sum: Atletico Madrid make the short trip to the Bernabeu to take on Real Madrid this evening. Evenly matched this season, just two points separate the sides in the La Liga table.
